title: Sufficiency of acts by third persons.
doc_html:
Art. 757.  Sufficiency of acts by third persons.

A predial servitude is preserved by the use made of it by anyone, even a stranger, if it is used as appertaining to the dominant estate.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
